content.scenarioHint: 你打算离职，想和经理协商一个双方都方便的离职日期，既要考虑自己的安排，也要体现对团队交接的责任感。
content.speakerText: I'm planning to wrap up by the end of this month, but I'm flexible if you need more time for the handover.
content.speakerTextCn: 我计划本月底结束工作，但如果你们需要更多时间交接，我很灵活。
expectedAnswers: Could I leave on the last day of this month? I want to make sure everything is properly handed over.
I was thinking of leaving in two weeks—would that give you enough time to find a replacement?
I'm available to stay until mid-next month if that works better for the team.
Would it be possible to finalize my departure on the 25th? I’d like to help train my successor before I go.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰表达了离职意向并表达了协商意愿
语言准确性：语法和时态使用是否正确，是否使用了恰当的礼貌表达
表达自然度：是否符合职场英语口语习惯，语气是否专业得体
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'handover', 'flexible', 'timeline', 'team needs' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I'm aiming to wrap up by the end of this week. Do you think that’s feasible?
content.speakerTextCn: 我计划这周末前结束工作，你觉得可行吗？
expectedAnswers: That works—we can finalize everything by Friday.
Actually, we’d prefer if you stayed until next Monday for the client handover.
Thanks for giving notice early; we’ll arrange the transition plan this week.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰回应了离职时间的可行性或提出替代方案
语言准确性：语法结构和时态是否正确
表达自然度：是否使用了职场常用表达如 wrap up / handover / finalize
关键词覆盖：是否包含 transition / handover / feasible / wrap up 等核心词汇
